_comment: Android update manifest. Each release: bump versionCode in build.gradle.kts AND here, then upload the APK with: gh release upload current Wander.apk --repo faisal-nabulsi/wander-site --clobber (binaries are NOT committed to this repo).
notes: New: a notification tells you the moment your Pokémon GO cooldown clears; long-distance jumps show a 'log off ~8h' safety tip; and GPS fixes now vary their accuracy/altitude slightly while moving so your location reads like a real device, not a perfect track.
